item.title: Warwick German Thumb BO5 Broadneck 2007 - Natural — $2,150
item.description:
$2,150 · Excellent · B-Mac Gear Exchange

2007 German Warwick Thumb Bolt-On 5 Broad Neck (BN)

If you’re looking for the unmistakable Warwick growl with the comfort of a true Broad Neck, this is it. This 2007 German-made Warwick Thumb Bolt-On 5 BN is in excellent condition and has been extremely well cared for. The natural oil finish showcases the beautiful grain of the Ovangkol body and neck, making it just as stunning visually as it is sonically.

Specifications

  • 2007 German-made Warwick Thumb Bolt-On 5
  • Broad Neck (BN) with 20mm string spacing
  • 47mm (1.9”) nut width
  • 34” scale
  • Solid Ovangkol body
  • 3-piece Ovangkol neck
  • Wenge fretboard
  • Warwick Bell Brass frets for exceptional durability, sustain, and articulation
  • MEC passive pickups with Warwick active 2-band EQ
  • Warwick 2-piece bridge
  • Just-A-Nut III adjustable nut
  • Warwick sealed tuners
  • Natural Oil Finish

One of the standout features of this bass is the Ovangkol body and neck, which produce a rich, punchy tone with strong low mids, clear highs, and excellent sustain. Combined with the Wenge fretboard and Bell Brass frets, this bass delivers the unmistakable Warwick voice—tight lows, aggressive mids, and incredible note definition that cuts through any mix.

Condition

  • Excellent cosmetic and playing condition
  • Frets have plenty of life remaining
  • Electronics work exactly as they should
  • Clean, well-maintained instrument that is ready for the stage or studio

Weight: 10 lbs. 9 oz.

Includes: Original Warwick gig bag.

These Broad Neck Thumb 5s don’t come up for sale very often, especially in this condition. If you’ve been looking for a classic German Warwick with the wider 47mm nut and 20mm string spacing, this is an excellent example.

item.title: Tanglewood Blackbird Electro-Acoustic Bass Guitar TB7ABCE — $413.61
item.description:
$413.61 · Brand New · Music Bits Company

The Blackbird TB7ABCE acoustic bass guitar is a testament to craftsmanship and innovation, offering bassists a remarkable instrument that delivers both powerful sound and unparalleled playability. Crafted with precision and care, this acoustic bass is designed to meet the needs of the modern musician, whether on stage, in the studio, or at home.

Featuring a Mahogany top, the TB7ABCE produces a deep, resonant tone with a rich low end and clear, articulate highs. The Mahogany back and sides further enhance the instrument’s tonal character, providing warmth and depth to every note played.

Equipped with a Tanglewood Premium Plus EQ system, this acoustic bass offers versatile control over your sound, allowing you to fine-tune your tone to suit any musical style or performance environment. Whether you prefer a punchy, focused sound for fingerstyle playing or a more rounded, full-bodied tone for strumming, the Premium Plus EQ ensures that you can achieve the perfect sound every time.

Finished in a sleek Smokestack Black Satin, the guitar exudes understated elegance and sophistication. The satin finish not only enhances the instrument’s visual appeal but also allows the natural beauty of the Mahogany wood grain to shine through, creating a striking aesthetic that’s sure to turn heads wherever you play.

Whether you’re a seasoned professional or an aspiring musician, the Blackbird TB7ABCE acoustic bass guitar offers exceptional quality, tone, and versatility, making it the perfect choice for bassists who demand nothing but the best from their instrument.

Specification:

Range Blackbird Body Shape Acoustic Bass Jumbo Top Mahogany Back Mahogany Sides Mahogany Fingerboard Engineered Wood Electronics Tanglewood Premium Plus Finish Smokestack Black Satin

item.title: Peavey Cirrus 2025 - Translucent Blue Flame Maple — $2,199
item.description:
$2,199 · Excellent · Rich's Bass Emporium

I have always been a fan of the Peavey Cirrus but I cannot afford to keep this one. I’m listing it low with the hope of moving it quickly. The quality of the build is impeccable. Every detail is perfect. Even the plate on the back of the headstock is exquisite as it is beveled into the finish for a perfectly smooth finish.

The tone is bright and punchy, very articulate. This bass will not disappoint.


Peavey's new Cirrus™ bass guitar lineup reintroduces the iconic 4- and 5-string models with nine distinct styles, blending high-end craftsmanship, exotic hardwoods, and powerful VFL humbuckers with 3-band active EQ. Reviving the beloved 1997 neck-through design pioneered by master luthier Mike Powers, these basses feature a 35-inch scale for enhanced low-end, visually striking maple or wenge tops, and elegant details like rosewood fretboards, Cirrus inlays, and gold or black hardware. With refined electronics and premium finishes, the Cirrus bass returns to offer a bold, modern evolution grounded in its respected legacy.

Featuring 4-string and 5-string models, in an encompassing collection of nine different styles, the new Peavey® Cirrus™ bass guitar models deliver the high level of craftsmanship and sonic character that helped bring Peavey fretted instruments to a new standard. With Peavey VFL humbuckers, 3-band active EQ, and visually striking designs, Cirrus basses are back to make their boldest statement yet.

The initial launch of handcrafted Cirrus basses in 1997 helped Peavey guitars gain a new level of respect among professional players. Peavey’s master luthier, the late Mike Powers, achieved excellent tone with a lighter, neck-through design. In the new Cirrus bass models, Peavey brings back this essential feature, as well as the use of exotic hardwoods, state-of-the-art electronics, and a 35-inch scale length to improve the low-end.

The new Cirrus bass design improves upon the VFL (Vertical Flux Loading) humbucker technology that originally debuted with this model. VFL was another Powers innovation that optimized the magnetic field for less inductance and enhanced high-frequency performance. Peavey’s VFL electronics include 3-band active Cirrus EQ, blend control, and master volume, allowing players of various styles to dial in their perfect tone.

There are two models available: the Cirrus 4-string and 5-string. Each model offers Flame Maple, Flame Maple Trans Black, Flame Maple Trans Blue, or Wenge wood for the top material. The Cirrus 4 offers the additional option of a Quilt Maple top. The maple tops are paired with alder bodies, achieving a harmonious balance of brightness and midrange warmth. Similarly, the pairing of the wenge top with walnut creates a distinctive tonal fusion resulting in a rich, balanced sound. A natural oil finish is used, with the exception of the Flame Maple Transparent Blue and Transparent Black models, which have a corresponding Gloss Burst finish for a dazzling splash of color.

On each model, a rosewood fretboard with 24 medium jumbo frets is reinforced by purple heart wood stringers, which not only add to the tonal depth but provide an eye-catching design that complements each instrument’s overall look. Another captivating signature feature is the Cirrus inlay on the 12th fret.

The engineering team also tips their hat to the lightweight 1997 design by using graphite pultrusion, as well as a graphite top nut and graphite overlay headstock with Peavey’s block letter logo.

Wood is the material of choice for the back plate, battery cover, and dual-action truss rod cover, secured with machine screws.

While most of the models have sleek black hardware, the Quilt Maple and Flame Maple models offer a unique flair with gold hardware. Dunlop-style strap locks come standard.

With the debut of Peavey’s new Cirrus bass guitars, past and present reunite to provide players endless possibilities for a new musical journey.

item.title: Squier Mini Precision Bass 2-Tone Sunburst — $209.99
item.description:
$209.99 · Brand New · Detroit Guitar

The Squier Mini Precision Bass packs the legendary Fender bass experience into a compact instrument that's perfect for beginners, younger players, traveling musicians, or guitarists looking to add bass to their arsenal.

Its lightweight poplar body and comfortable 28.6" short-scale neck make it incredibly approachable while delivering the unmistakable style and feel that have made the Precision Bass an icon for more than 70 years. Loaded with a Squier split single-coil Precision Bass pickup, the Mini P Bass produces the warm, punchy low end that has powered countless recordings across every genre. Simple volume and tone controls keep dialing in great bass tones easy, while the vintage-style 4-saddle bridge and sealed die-cast tuning machines provide dependable tuning stability and solid performance.

Whether you're buying your first bass, looking for a comfortable instrument for smaller hands, or adding a fun travel companion to your collection, the Squier Mini Precision Bass delivers authentic Fender character in a size that's easy to take anywhere.

Specs: Poplar body; Maple neck; "C"-shaped neck profile; Indian Laurel fingerboard; 28.6" scale length; 9.5" fingerboard radius; 20 Narrow Tall frets; Synthetic Bone nut; 1.5" nut width; Pearloid Dot inlays; 4-Saddle Vintage-Style bridge; Sealed die-cast tuning machines; Chrome hardware; 1-Ply White pickguard. Gloss Polyurethane 2-Tone Sunburst finish. 

Electronics: Squier Split Single-Coil Precision Bass pickup; Master volume and tone controls.

item.title: MTD Kingston Z6MP Electric Bass, 6-String (with Maple Fingerboard), Tobacco Sunburst — $1,549
item.description:
$1,549 · Brand New · zZounds

For the discerning player in search of a handmade look and sound, MTD presents the MTD Z Series, which incorporates many of the superior design elements present in MTD Handmade instruments into a production model.

Further playing up the boutique-style of this instrument, the Kingston Z features a high quality (and carefully constructed) Mahogany core, with a beautiful Burled Maple top. The carved mahogany body lends a rich voice and darker overtone to the instrument, while the burl top helps to focus the low end, delivering unparalleled beauty and performance.

The Kingston Z features an elegant matching headstock, and asymmetrical neck, providing exceptional ergonomics, ranking it high among players as one of Michael Tobias Designs' most popular models. The V2 version is equipped with Hipshot open gear tuning machines and carbon fiber support rods, for increased stability and durability.

Specs: 

  • Electronics: Proprietary MTD Kingston
  • Preamp: 3 band active
  • Tuners: Hipshot open gear tuning machines
  • Body: Mahogany
  • Top: Burl Maple
  • Neck: Maple
  • Fretboard: Maple
  • Scale Length: 35"
  • Number of Frets: 24
  • Neck: Carbon Fiber Truss rods in neck

item.title: Yamaha BBP35 5-String Bass Made in Japan MIJ w/ Hard Case — Excellent / Mint — $1,500
item.description:
$1,500 · Excellent · Savannah Bass

For sale is my Yamaha BBP35, Yamaha’s high-end Made in Japan 5-string from the BB Pro series. This is a seriously professional bass: extremely solid build quality, great fretwork, excellent balance, and a very usable P/J-style voice that can cover just about anything.

The BBP35 gives you that familiar BB-series punch and authority, but with the refinement of Yamaha’s Japanese-made Pro line. It has a strong, clear low B, a comfortable neck, and a very musical passive tone. The pickup blend makes it easy to go from big P-style fundamental to tighter, more articulate J-style definition.

Condition is excellent to mint. It has been well cared for and has not been abused. No major dings, dents, or issues. Electronics work properly, truss rod functions as it should, and the bass plays cleanly up and down the neck.

This is a great choice if you want a professional 5-string that is reliable, versatile, and built to a very high standard without going into boutique pricing.

Details:

  • Yamaha BBP35
  • Made in Japan
  • 5-string bass
  • Passive P/J pickup configuration
  • Alder/maple/alder body construction
  • 5-piece maple/mahogany neck
  • Rosewood fingerboard
  • 34" scale
  • 21 frets
  • Vintage Plus bridge
  • Excellent / mint condition
  • Includes Original Hardshell Case
  • Weight: 9lbs 9oz

Condition notes:
This bass is in excellent to mint condition with only very minor signs of careful handling, if any. Please review the photos closely, as they are part of the description.

Shipping:
The bass will be professionally packed and shipped in its hard case inside a proper shipping box. I will loosen the strings slightly and pack the case securely so the bass does not move during transit.

Why I’m selling:
I’m consolidating my bass collection and moving a few excellent instruments that overlap with other pieces I own.

Feel free to reach out with any questions or reasonable offers.

item.title: Ibanez AGB200-BKF Standard Artcore Bass - Black Flat — $584.99
item.description:
$584.99 · B-Stock · GuitarSloth

Grab an Ibanez AGB200 semi-hollowbody 4-string electric bass and get the feel of an electric bass plus rich and woody acoustic tone. Part of Ibanez's Artcore Bass series, this set-neck bass gives you the lively sound of an all-maple body, the sustain of a 3-piece maple and mahogany neck, and the smooth feel of a laurel fretboard. Bolstering its natural semi-hollowbody acoustics are a pair of Classic Elite humbucking pickups. The AGB200 is suited for any style of music that you play, and with its classy looks, you can use it at everything from bluegrass bar gigs to black-tie jazz shows. Get the big, warm, and natural tone you've been looking for with an Ibanez AGB200 semi-hollowbody bass guitar.

Semi-acoustic body with maple top, back, and sides provides a bright and naturally expressive tone

There's no substitute for the mellow and naturally resonant sound of an electric bass with a semi-acoustic body. Ibanez built their AGB200 semi-hollowbody bass to capture the fat warmth of a classic semi-hollowbody, which is why they built it with an all-laminate maple body. Whether you're playing rockabilly, blues, jazz, or any number of modern styles, you're going to love the character the AGB200 semi-hollowbody bass guitar brings to your music.

Humbucking pickups deliver punchy bass

Ibanez basses are used in every style of music from metal to rock to jazz and country. The versatile pickups in the AGB200 give you warm, full tones that are ideal for any gig. These pickups complement the semi-hollow design perfectly with extra output and punch. Bassists are sure you'll be impressed with the sound of this unique bass.

A neck designed for comfort and performance

The slightly shorter 30-inch scale of the Ibanez AGB200 is extremely comfortable to play. A set maple/mahogany neck topped with a laurel fretboard feels great thanks to its Artcore Bass neck profile. The 15.75-inch radius makes the entire fingerboard easy to reach, and the cutaway body design lets you access the upper fretboard without any issues. There's no question about it: the Ibanez AGB200 was made to be played!

Ibanez AGB200 Semi-hollowbody 4-string Electric Bass Guitar Features:

  • Semi-hollowbody bass tones with the feel of an electric
  • Maple back, sides, and top offer big hollowbody sound
  • Set-in 3-piece maple/mahogany neck with 30.3-inch scale
  • Humbucking pickups deliver classic tone and punch
  • Comfortable Artcore Bass neck shape

This item is a "B-Stock Guitar" directly from the manufacturer. It is NEW Stock that has never been owned. Pictures are of the actual guitar you will receive.

A "B-Stock Guitar" is a guitar that won't have structural or playability issues but could possibly have some particular minor cosmetic flaw which can keep it from passing the rigorous inspection process put in place by the guitar manufacturer. These guitars do not come with manufacture warranty.

we will have our licensed tech go over the guitar and set it up for you. On this guitar Ibanez states it B-Stock due to flaw on back a glossy spot (see pictures)

item.title: MTD Kingston Z6 Left-Handed Electric Bass, Natural — $1,549
item.description:
$1,549 · Brand New · zZounds

The MTD Kingston Z is the flagship design of the Kingston line and takes many of its design cues from the Handmade USA MTDs. Like all MTD Kingston instruments, the Z undergoes a rigorous quality control and setup process in the US facility from master technicians.

Features:

  • Left-Handed configuration
  • Powerful tone & artisanal craftsmanship
  • Mahogany body with Figured Maple top
  • Maple neck & fretboard
  • Asymmetrical neck shape with Carbon Fiber Reinforcement
  • Compound 10" - 14" fretboard radius
  • 2 MTD Split Coil pickups
  • Volume control, 3-Band EQ, & Pickup blend
  • Active EQ with 6db of boost/cut for each frequency band
  • Buzz Feiten Tuning System for precise intonation

The Z features signature asymmetrical neck and compound fingerboard radius, which allows the player hours of comfortable, fatigue free playing. The Buzz Feiten Tuning System provides precise intonation up and down the fretboard. The robust, top-loading, Quick Release Bridge allows for speedy and easy string changes, while the Licensed Hipshot Ultralite Tuners provide confidence without neck dive.

The active pickups and preamp compliment the mahogany body and maple burl top with +/- 6db of boost or cut at 3 specifically chosen frequencies. The matching headstock provides and elegant, high end look and the body contours follow an ergonomic and attractive design which lends itself to many fantastic finishes.

Specs:

  • Scale: 35"
  • Strings: 6
  • Body: Mahogany
  • Top: Figured Maple
  • Neck: Asymmetrical Maple with Carbon Fiber Reinforcement
  • Fingerboard Material: Maple
  • Fingerboard Radius: Compound 10" - 14"
  • Frets : 24
  • Pickups: MTD Split Coil
  • Electronics: Active 3-band EQ
  • Controls: Volume, Pickup Blend, Bass, Middle, Treble
  • Hardware Color: Smoked Chrome
  • Tuning Machines: Licensed Hipshot Ultralight
  • Colors: Natural Gloss
  • Tuning: Buzz Feiten Tuning System
  • String Spacing: 18mm

item.description:

Roger Sadowsky has always been dedicated to pushing the boundaries of bass guitar design, consistently striving to enhance every aspect of an instrument's performance. With his MetroExpress 21-Fret Hybrid P/J 4-String Bass, Sadowsky has elevated bass design to another level, incorporating a blend of cutting-edge features that make this bass a true standout. Through the use of his proprietary special electronics, lightweight tuners, and meticulously selected tonewoods, this instrument offers exceptional tonal clarity, playability, and visual appeal.

The bass features a lightweight solid Okoume body that is finished in a stunning High Polish. The roasted maple neck and fingerboard not only contribute to the bass's sleek appearance but also enhance its resonance and durability, making it comfortable to play and ensuring long-lasting performance.

The MetroExpress series is designed to provide easy access to the renowned Sadowsky tone, and this 21-Fret Hybrid P/J 4-String Bass delivers just that. The tone is never harsh or shrill, with a powerful low-end that is full and punchy but remains clear and defined, never muddy. The mids are present and well-balanced, offering warmth and character without being too aggressive, while the treble is sweet and airy, allowing for a bright, clear presence that cuts through the mix effortlessly. Whether you're playing in a live setting, recording in the studio, or practicing at home, this bass provides a versatile and refined sound that adapts to any musical situation.

Overall, the MetroExpress 21-Fret Hybrid P/J 4-String Bass is the perfect combination of stunning looks, superb craftsmanship, and unparalleled tone. Designed with both the professional bassist and serious enthusiast in mind, it offers a seamless playing experience and delivers the iconic Sadowsky sound. With this bass in your hands, you can be confident that you are not only playing an instrument of exceptional quality but also a true work of musical art.

item.title: Sadowsky MetroExpress MV4 Electric Bass, Morado Fingerboard (with Gig Bag), Sunburst — $1,225
item.description:
$1,225 · Brand New · zZounds

Roger Sadowsky has spent his career dedicated to the art of bass guitar craftsmanship, always striving to refine and elevate traditional bass design with innovative improvements. His mission has been clear from the start: to create instruments that not only meet but exceed the expectations of discerning musicians. With a relentless commitment to quality and performance, Roger has developed a range of enhancements that make his bass guitars stand out from the rest. By utilizing proprietary special electronics, lightweight tuners, and carefully selected tonewoods, he has successfully taken the MetroExpress 21-Fret Vintage M Bass 4-String to another level of excellence, ensuring a superior playing experience for bassists of all styles and skill levels.

At the heart of this exceptional instrument is its thoughtfully chosen construction and materials. The body is crafted from lightweight solid Okoume, a tonewood known for its balanced resonance and remarkable sustain. This combination of materials not only enhances the instrument's visual appeal but also contributes to its dynamic tonal characteristics, making it a perfect blend of style and substance.

The roasted maple neck is another standout feature, providing outstanding stability, durability, and a comfortable feel that makes extended playing sessions effortless. Roasting the maple improves its structural integrity and resistance to environmental changes, ensuring that the neck remains straight and reliable over time. Complementing this is the morado fingerboard, which adds warmth and richness to the bass's overall tone. Morado, often compared to rosewood, offers a smooth playing surface and contributes to a well-rounded, articulate sound that allows for expressive playing across all genres.

However, what truly sets this bass apart is its signature Sadowsky tone. The MetroExpress series has been meticulously designed to provide bassists with direct access to that legendary sound--one that is consistently praised for its clarity, depth, and musicality. The bass frequencies are strong and powerful yet never muddy, ensuring that the low end remains tight and well-defined. The mids are present and articulate but never overpowering, striking the perfect balance between warmth and attack. The treble is sweet and airy, adding just the right amount of sparkle and presence without becoming harsh or shrill. This tonal profile makes the MetroExpress 21-Fret Vintage M Bass a versatile instrument, capable of delivering everything from deep, grooving bass lines to bright, expressive melodies.

Designed with both professionals and aspiring bassists in mind, this bass is built to deliver a seamless playing experience. Whether you're performing on stage, recording in the studio, or practicing at home, you'll appreciate the instrument's impeccable craftsmanship and effortless playability. Every detail has been carefully considered to ensure that this bass not only looks incredible but also feels and sounds phenomenal.

With its combination of cutting-edge design, premium materials, and the unmistakable Sadowsky tone, the MetroExpress 21-Fret Vintage M Bass 4-String is an instrument that inspires creativity and musical expression. It represents the perfect fusion of tradition and modern innovation, making it an excellent choice for bassists who demand the very best from their instrument. Whether you're a touring musician, a recording artist, or simply a passionate player, this bass is sure to become an essential part of your musical journey.

item.title: Gibson Thunderbird Rare Walnut 2014 with original hard shell case - 120th Anniversary — $1,970.53
item.description:
$1,970.53 · Very Good · Lorenzo's House of Gear

2014 Gibson Thunderbird Bass, Walnut Finish, Neck-Thru, Original Case - Ready to Rock

The Thunderbird is one of the most iconic bass designs ever made, and the walnut finish is one of the harder colourways to track down. This example is in excellent condition and comes complete with the original Gibson brown hardshell case.

The Bass

This is a 2014 model, finished in the less common walnut colourway and built to Gibson's classic Thunderbird spec. The neck-thru construction is what separates a real Thunderbird from the rest, a 9-ply mahogany/walnut multi-laminate that runs the full length of the body for exceptional sustain and resonance. It also carries the 120th Anniversary banner on the fingerboard, making it a collectible piece of Gibson history.

The T-Bird Plus pickups deliver that unmistakable Thunderbird growl, aggressive in the mids, thick on the low end, and unlike anything a Jazz or Precision can produce. Black chrome hardware throughout looks sharp against the walnut finish.

Specs

  • Body: Mahogany wings
  • Neck: 9-ply mahogany/walnut multi-laminate, neck-thru construction
  • Fingerboard: Rosewood, 34" scale
  • Inlay: 120th Anniversary banner
  • Pickups: T-Bird Plus Bridge: Black chrome three-point adjustable
  • Hardware: Black chrome
  • Weight: 3.75kg

What's Included

2014 Gibson Thunderbird Bass in very good condition and the original Gibson brown hardshell rectangular case. Recently set up professionally by Dave's World of Fun Stuff. Very good overall with some typical finish checking and light wear around the edges (see photos), but no dings, dents, or major scratches. Plays and sounds exactly as it should.

A rare finish, a landmark anniversary year, and neck-thru construction at a used price. Questions welcome and additional photos available on request.A rare finish, a landmark anniversary year, and neck-thru construction at a used price. Questions welcome and additional photos available on request.

item.title: Duesenberg Alliance Series Bros. Landreth Dave's Bass - Catalina Sunset Rose — $4,299
item.description:
$4,299 · Brand New · ProAudioStar

Alliance Series

Bros. Landreth

The Bros. Landreth X Duesenberg Guitars

Embark on a harmonious journey as Duesenberg guitars proudly joins forces with the musical virtuosos,

The Bros. Landreth.

This collaboration blends Duesenberg's legacy of unparalleled craftsmanship with the unique artistry of The Brothers Landreth, renowned for their soulful melodies and innovative sound. Together, we've crafted a series that encapsulates the essence of musical innovation and passion.

Experience a blend of precision and distinctive style, resulting in a unique collection of instruments that speak to the heart of musicians and enthusiasts alike.

Get ready for a harmonious journey through the soundscapes of Duesenberg and the musical prowess of The Bros. Landreth.

Dave's Bass

Based on our proven Starplayer Bass design, Dave's Bass delivers the mellow, yet defined low end foundation needed for the Bros. Landreth sophisticated compositions.

Formed in 2011, The Bros. Landreth, hailing from Winnipeg, Canada, emerged as a folk-rock powerhouse with a distinctive blend of Americana, blues, and roots influences.

Led by brothers Joey and David Landreth, the band quickly gained acclaim for their soulful songwriting and masterful musicianship. In 2013, their debut album, "Let It Lie," earned a Juno Award, marking a significant milestone in their career. Renowned for heartfelt lyrics and exceptional guitar work, The Bros. Landreth continue to carve their niche in the music landscape, captivating audiences with their genuine storytelling and a timeless sound that transcends genres.

Dave's Bass

In this customized version, we've refined the tonal concept of the Bass to accurately capture the sound envisioned by Dave.

The neck position houses the acclaimed Duesenberg Alnico-Blade Bass Singlecoil in a custom noiseless version under the new Gold-Foil style cover. This pickup brings the transparency assosciated with a classic Singlecoil but cancels any unwanted noise on stage. Noise-Cancelling can be switched on or off via a small switch on the pickguard.

In the bridge position, you'll find the latest Duesenberg Gold-Foil Bass Singlecoil beneath a Phonico cover. This configuration offers exceptional transparency and clarity, while also providing ample low-end power to fill the venue with rich tones.

Each pickup has a seperate volume control, as well as a master-tone, allowing Dave to blend both pickups seamlessly.

Made to hold something that lasts

A good case is one that's more sturdy than what's inside.

Handsome, laid-back and simply a good place for your instrument. Meet the Duesenberg Custom Line Cases. True flightcase quality, classically shaped, beautifully handcrafted and made to endure the most realistic and unrealistic abuses. item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man Bongo 6 HH 6-String Bass - Mystique — $3,299
item.description:
$3,299 · Brand New · ProAudioStar

The Bongo represents everything a modern bass should be: well-balanced, comfortable, resonant, and expressive with effortless playability. The double-cutaway basswood body design is of superior construction and, along with a 24-fret neck, offers unimpeded access for high-register two-octave fretwork. The Bongo is available with two Ernie Ball Music Man proprietary humbucking pickups, a 4-band EQ, Neodymium magnets, and an 18V active preamp that delivers a powerful combination of unparalleled tonal diversity.

Powerful preamp and neodymium pickups

24 frets and custom half-moon inlays

Ergonomic light weight tuners

Designed To Perfection

The Bongo’s uniquely shaped body design is built for comfort and provides unparalleled access to all 24 high profile frets. The maple neck is outfitted with either rosewood, ebony, or maple fretboard, half-moon inlays, and a custom neck carve, providing an ultra-comfortable playing experience.

Custom Designed Pickups

Ernie Ball Music Man custom-designed humbucking pickups feature powerful neodymium magnets, bringing you more output and a wider range of sounds.

Lightweight Hardware

Lightweight tuning machines create a more balanced neck while providing ultra-reliable tuning stability.

18-Volt Preamp

An 18-volt 4-band preamp with extra clean headroom lets you dial in everything from modern punch to classic, vintage tones.

Finest Materials

Hand-selected body and neck woods are sustainably sourced from our network of hardwood suppliers worldwide. Basswood, ebony, and maple tonewoods are individually chosen and matched for their beautiful appearance and rich tonal qualities.

item.title: Fender US Geddy Lee Artist Series Signature Jazz Bass 2015 - OHSC - Mint — $2,411.69
item.description:
$2,411.69 · Excellent · Lorenzo's House of Gear

2015 Fender USA Geddy Lee Jazz Bass: Upgraded & Excellent-Mint Condition

One of the most sought-after signature basses ever made, and this one has been thoughtfully upgraded to take it even further. This 2015 USA-made Geddy Lee Jazz Bass is in excellent to mint condition, with no chips, no major scratches, clean electronics, and plays exactly as it should. I'm the current caretaker moving it along only to fund a vintage bass acquisition.

The Upgrades
Two upgrades that Geddy himself would approve of:

  • Leo Quan Badass II Bridge: a legendary high-mass bridge that tightens up the low end and improves sustain noticeably over the stock unit
  • Tom Brantley Hand-wound Geddy Lee Signature Pickups: wound specifically to nail the tone of Geddy's prized 1972 Jazz Bass. These are the real deal and transform this already great instrument into something special

The Bass
Built to combine the specs of Lee's three favourite basses, two Custom Shop versions of his signature model and his iconic sleek black '72 Jazz Bass, the USA Geddy Lee is the closest production instrument to what you hear on those classic Rush records.

The Custom Thick "C" maple neck with hand-rubbed oil finish on the back plays fast and feels broken in from the moment you pick it up. The maple fingerboard with white binding and white pearloid block inlays looks stunning, and the 9.5" radius with medium jumbo frets is comfortable for players who want a vintage feel without vintage stiffness.

Specs

  • Body: Alder, Gloss Polyurethane finish
  • Neck: Maple, Custom Thick "C" — Hand Rubbed Oil back / Gloss Urethane front
  • Fingerboard: Maple, 9.5" radius, White Pearloid Block inlays
  • Frets: 20, Medium Jumbo
  • Scale: 34"
  • Nut: Bone, 1.5"
  • Bridge: Leo Quan Badass II (upgraded - Grooved Saddles)
  • Pickups: Tom Brantley Geddy Lee Signature (upgraded)
  • Pickguard: 4-Ply White Pearloid
  • Tuners: Vintage-Style Open-Back
  • Controls: Volume, Volume, Master Tone
  • Hardware: Nickel/Chrome

What's Included

  • The bass in excellent to mint condition
  • Fender Deluxe Molded Bass Case (great condition)

This is a pro-level instrument that punches well above its price point, especially with these upgrades already done. Pro setup recently done by Dave's World of Fun Stuff. Questions welcome, happy to provide additional photos.

item.title: Duesenberg Triton Longscale Bass Guitar - Gold Top — $4,199
item.description:
$4,199 · Brand New · ProAudioStar

Triton Bass

The longscale workhorse

Solid-Body

Contoured body made from Alder. Solid-Body constructions deliver instant response, a lot of attack and sustain and perfect feedback resistance. Alder is a versatile tone-wood known for its bright voice and versatility.

Phonico Pickups

Passive 5-way switch wiring featuring our noiseless Duesenberg SingleTwin Bass pickups under the elegant Phonico pickup covers. An additional switch on the pickguard allows switching between parallel and serial mode for the pickups.

Plek Processed

A Plek processed fretboard guarantees perfectly level frets. This is the basis for our multi-step fret polishing and setup work all done by hand that eventually makes all our instruments play like nothing you have ever played before.

34" Longscale

The Triton Bass was designed to be a real workhorse. It’s a punchy 34″ longscale construction using a unique three pickup layout which are controlled by an easy to use 5-Way switch and straight forward volume and tone controls. The additional switch on the pickguard allows you to choose between parallel and serial mode for the pickups.

We used our own designed SingleTwin Bass pickups in this model, which give you a noise-free tone while keeping a completely passive wiring.

The Block Bridge

The 12″ Indian Rosewood fretboard is combined with a one-piece, bolt on solid American Hardrock Maple neck which leads the strings all the way down to our newly designed Duesenberg “The Block” Bass bridge. This bridge offers extensive adjustability, great tone-transfer and long sustain.

The Triton Bass is available in all Black or Gold-Top with black sides, back and neck.

Nickel Hardware

Most of our hardware is nickel finished.

You will find the geometrical three steps in almost every part on our instruments, from the curves on the headstock to the shape of the output jack.

When compared to regular chrome finishes, nickel has a beautiful warm and elegant sheen and ages naturally over time. It's the way things were done before chrome became the standard. If you don't want the hardware on your instrument to age, we recommend regular cleaning.

Made to hold something that lasts

A good case is one that's more sturdy than what's inside.

Handsome, laid-back and simply a good place for your instrument. Meet the Duesenberg Custom Line Cases. True flightcase quality, classically shaped, beautifully handcrafted and made to endure the most realistic and unrealistic abuses. It's a case you can just throw in the back of a car, train or airplane and won't have to worry about.

This instrument comes including the Duesenberg Custom Line Case as standard.

Features

Neck

  • Type : Bolt-on Neck, 1-piece Maple
  • Width (4-string) : 41 mm / 1.61" (nut), 57 mm / 2.25" (12th fret)
  • Thickness : 21 mm / 0.8" (1st fret), 24 mm / 0.95" (12th fret)
  • Shape : Medium D
  • Fingerboard : Indian Rosewood, radius 305 mm / 12"
  • Inlays : Cream dots
  • Frets : 20 Jumbo 2.8 x 1.0 mm
  • Scale length : 864 mm / 34"
  • Trussrod : Steel dual-action
  • Headstock : Black

Body

  • Type : Solidbody, American Alder
  • Dimensions : 51 x 33 cm / 20" x 13"
  • Height (sides) : 4.2 cm / 1.7"
  • Binding : Cream
  • Pickguard : Black Custom
  • Finish : PUR lacquer

A "B-Stock Guitar" is a guitar that won't have structural or playability issues but could possibly have some particular minor cosmetic flaw which can keep it from passing the rigorous inspection process put in place by the guitar manufacturer. These guitars do not come with manufacture warranty.

we will have our licensed tech go over the guitar and set it up for you. I personally did not see the blemish on this one when I looked over it. item.title: Spector Euro4 LX neck thru Trans Black Satin — $3,400
item.description:
$3,400 · Excellent · David's Gear Outlet

NEW....

The Euro LX offers all the features that have made the Spector name famous around the globe. Inspired by the iconic NS-2, Euro LX basses feature a fully carved and contoured body, high-grade tonewoods, and professional-grade elec­tronics and hardware. For the first time ever, players can now choose between neck-thru and bolt-on construction in the Euro LX range.


Each Euro LX bass, regardless of construction, is crafted using premium materials, including a European Alder body, figured European Maple top, and a 3-piece North American Maple neck combined with a Rosewood fingerboard for strength, stability, and sustain. These basses are then outfitted with a lightweight aluminum bridge for spot-on, reliable intonation. Premium active pickups from EMG provide the exceptional clarity, attack, and silent operation that Spector is known for.


Spector is proud to offer the all-new Spector Legacy preamp for the Euro LX range. This new preamp was designed in collaboration with Darkglass Elec­tronics to deliver the classic ‘Spector growl’ heard on countless iconic recordings over the years. The newly revised Euro LX range is available in four distinct, hand-rubbed stains, including Transparent Black, Natural Sunburst, Haunted Moss, and Nightshade. Each of these enchanting colors features a durable and comfort­able matte finish.


EMG Pickups

Premium active pickups from EMG provide the exceptional clarity, attack, and silent operation that Spector is known for.

Spector Legacy Preamp

Designed in collaboration with Darkglass Elec­tronics to deliver the classic 'Spector growl' heard on countless iconic recordings over the years supplemented with modern versatility.

Neck-Thru Construction

Neck-thru construction is a key element of the classic Spector style and sound, allowing effortless playability and pronounced mid-range response

item.title: 1960s Rickenbacker NAMM Display Banner Blue/Gold *Incredibly Rare* One of Two Known to Exist — $1,999
item.description:
$1,999 · Very Good · Guitarmony

This is a rarity unlike anything you’ll come across today.


Rickenbacker put two of these gold and blue display banners out at their booth for the 1963 NAMM show. There is no evidence that they’ve ever made more. This is one of the two hung at their table and is displayed in the Rittor Music Rickenbacker book.


The banner does not include a dowel to hang it. Just the banner as you see it on display.


You will never find another one of these.

item.description:

Fender PB-75 Circa 2004-2005

$$$ It has just been professionally set up and dialed in for optimal tone and playability. It has low action with no buzzing. The frets are in perfect condition and polished to shine like a mirror, it is truly stage or studio ready/worthy. Including New Strings,  Perfect Intonation, Truss Rod Adjustment and Low Action Read Our Feedback and Rest Assured, The Dude Abides!


🔥 Vintage Tone Monster Alert: 2004 Fender Japan PB 75 Precision Bass in White – Ready to Rumble!

Step up to a true player’s instrument. This 2004 Fender Japan PB 75 is a stunning recreation of the classic 1975 Precision Bass, built during the golden era of Japanese Fender craftsmanship when attention to detail was second to none.

Finish: Classic White – clean, timeless, and aggressive. The body has that perfect vintage-inspired contour that sits beautifully against you, while the gloss still pops after two decades.

Condition: Excellent for a 22-year-old bass. It’s been well cared for and shows honest light play wear. There is one small ding on the back bottom edge (barely noticeable unless you’re hunting for it), but the rest of the guitar is remarkably clean – no major scratches, no belt rash, no ugly buckle wear. The neck is straight, the frets have plenty of life, and the hardware retains its shine.

Playability & Setup: This bass is professionally set up and dialed in for maximum tone and effortless playability. Low action, perfect intonation, balanced neck feel – it plays like a dream right out of the case. Whether you’re laying down tight funk grooves, thumping classic rock, or sliding through modern slap lines, this PB responds instantly with authority.

Tone: That legendary Precision growl is all here – thick, punchy low end, articulate mids, and a singing high end that cuts through the mix. The original-style split-coil pickup delivers the authentic vintage Fender sound that’s powered countless hit records. Plug it in and you’ll immediately hear why these Japanese reissues are so highly regarded.

Specs Highlights:

•  Alder body

•  Maple neck with rosewood fingerboard

•  Classic Precision Bass pickup

•  Vintage-style tuners and bridge

•  34” scale length

This is a serious workhorse bass that looks great, sounds massive, and plays like it was built yesterday. Whether you’re a gigging pro, serious collector, or someone who just wants the best-sounding Precision on the block, this PB-75 will not disappoint.

Priced to move for a bass in this condition. Serious inquiries only – this one won’t last long.

DM for videos, more photos, or to arrange a play test. Shipping available worldwide with full insurance.

Don’t miss your chance at a clean, killer-sounding Japanese Fender Precision that’s already broken in and ready to make music. Grab it before someone else does! 🎸​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​



🔥 This guitar (or bass) has been professionally set up and dialed in for optimal tone and playability. Unless otherwise noted in the listing, It features low action with no buzzing or dead spots, perfect intonation, a brand-new set of American-made Ernie Ball strings, and a straight neck with a fully functional truss rod. Wr make sure all frets are leveled, dressed, crowned, and polished to a mirror shine. The fingerboard has been thoroughly cleaned (unfinished rosewood and ebony boards are treated with Fret Doctor, a premium all-natural oil). All electronics function flawlessly. The guitar has been deep-cleaned and detailed and arrives stage- or studio-ready. 🔥


About The Guitar Dude 

Three-time NAMM Top 100 Dealer worldwide. Specializing in premium Gibson, classic Fender guitars from all eras and the best Japanese made treasures. Known for the highest-quality consignment sales and custom layaway plans (available on select guitars and extendable beyond 45 days to fit your budget—contact us for details).  

Often copied, never duplicated. Follow us on Facebook & Instagram for beautiful guitar content. 


Consignment Services

Like what you see? Let us go to work for you. We offer the best and most fair priced consignment service on the planet! Look for me online. @TheGuitarDude


Our Guarantee  

We stand behind every guitar we sell. “Good enough” is never good enough. Every instrument is inspected, set up, and tested by multiple people immediately before shipping. We deliver the highest standard of quality and have built a reputation as a three-time NAMM Top 100 Dealer since 2009. The Dude Abides.  


Neck & Setup - (unless otherwise noted)

- Neck is perfectly straight with no truss-rod issues. 

- Intonation is spot-on.  

- Professionally set up with low action and new American-made strings.  

- All frets are dressed, leveled, crowned (if needed), and all frets on all guitars are polished to shine like new with no divots.  


Return Policy, Restocking Fees & No Tire-Kicking Policy 

We follow Reverb’s 7-day return policy. However:  

- You must notify us in writing within 3 days of delivery (per tracking) of your intent to return.  

- Original shipping and return shipping costs are not refunded unless the guitar is damaged in transit or is significantly not as described.  

- A 15% restocking fee applies to all returns for any reason other than damage in transit or significantly not as described.  


We do our best to honestly describe and photograph every guitar and most of the noticeable imperfections. That said, we are human, if something very small can be overseen, if tiny marks, dings or super fine scratches (normal wear) bother you, please don't buy.


We record demo videos of every guitar before shipping to document exact condition and performance. Additional photos, measurements, or in-hand descriptions are available upon request prior to purchase.  


Minor adjustments and tweaks to a set up (for example to correct a slight buzz or truss-rod tweak) are normal after shipping due to carrier mishandling the package, climate & atmospheric changes, especially when moving from South Florida to colder or less humid environments. These slight issues do not constitute “significantly not as described.” Guitars must be returned in the exact same condition as received/advertised or additional repair/restocking fees will apply.  


We are a small family owned and run business, not a big-chain retailer. We invest significant time, money and effort into every guitar. This is a NO TIRE-KICKING shop. There is no post purchase haggling, returns without restocking fees or partial refunds. If minor cosmetic marks, tiny imperfections, or the possibility of a post-shipping setup tweak makes you uncomfortable, please do not buy. Plenty of large retailers offer free trials and can absorb shipping costs—we do not.  


Payment, Shipping & International Duties  

- All items can be shipped internationally. Buyer is fully responsible for all import duties, taxes, and customs fees.  

- We accept PayPal, PayPal Credit, Affirm, and other major payment methods.  

- Most U.S. shipments are sent via UPS or FedEx with full insurance, tracking, and signature confirmation. All packages are professionally packed for maximum protection.  


International Shipping Note 

International shipping prices shown are for most countries. Certain countries have higher costs. We try and avoid USPS and mostly ship UPS, but USPS is the only available or reasonable carrier in certain situations. Express services (UPS, DHL, FedEx) are always available. We can’t under value merchandise as it can not be properly insured. If you would like to discuss different avenues, contact us by phone for a personalized quote.  


Thank you for considering The Guitar Dude. We look forward to earning your business and delivering a guitar that exceeds your expectations. Contact us anytime for questions, consignment inquiries, layaway details, or a personalized shipping quote.

item.title: Ibanez BTB945COL-BTB Standard - Cosmic Blue — $1,349.99
item.description:
$1,349.99 · B-Stock · GuitarSloth

Ibanez BTB945 5-String Bass – Poplar Burl Top – Boutique Tone & Pro-Level Control

The Ibanez BTB945 is a powerhouse 5-string bass built for players who demand premium tone, extended sustain, and total control over their sound. With high-end tonewoods, neck-through construction, and advanced electronics, this bass delivers boutique-level performance at an accessible price.

At its core is a neck-through 5-piece maple and walnut neck, reinforced for stability and paired with ash/okoume body wings and a stunning poplar burl top. This combination produces deep lows, rich mids, and articulate highs with exceptional sustain and balance across all strings. The rosewood fingerboard adds warmth and smooth playability across all 24 frets.

Loaded with Nordstrand Big Single pickups, the BTB945 delivers punchy, dynamic tone with excellent clarity and response. The onboard 3-band active EQ, along with a 3-way mid-frequency switch, EQ bypass, and balancer control, gives you precise tonal shaping—whether you need modern aggression, clean articulation, or warm vintage character.

The Mono-rail V bridge enhances sustain and string separation, ensuring every note is clear and defined. Designed for performance, the BTB945 offers comfort, stability, and tonal flexibility for stage or studio use.

Key Features:

  • Neck-through construction for maximum sustain and stability
  • 5-piece maple/walnut neck with ash/okoume body and poplar burl top
  • Rosewood fingerboard with 24 frets
  • Nordstrand Big Single pickups for punchy, articulate tone
  • 3-band active EQ with EQ bypass and 3-way mid-frequency switch
  • Balancer control for precise pickup blending
  • Mono-rail V bridge for enhanced sustain and string isolation
  • Graphite reinforcement rods for added neck stability

Available now at cahousemusic.com

This item is a "B-Stock Guitar" directly from the manufacturer. It is NEW Stock that has never been owned. Pictures are of the actual guitar you will receive.

we will have our licensed tech go over the guitar and set it up for you. Ibanez states the reason for the B-Stock designation is blue sharpie/paint inside truss rod adjustment cavity (see pictures)

Including New Strings,  Perfect Intonation, Truss Rod Adjustment and Low Action Read Our Feedback and Rest Assured, The Dude Abides!


🖤 Stealth Mode Activated: 2019 Fender Japan FSR 60s Jazz Bass – All Black with Matching Headstock! 🖤

Looking for a sleek, tone-packed Jazz Bass that turns heads and drops jaws? This limited 2019 Factory Special Run (FSR) Fender Japan 60s Jazz Bass in solid Black with matching black headstock is a rare stunner that combines vintage ’60s vibe with modern Japanese precision.

This is no ordinary J-Bass. As part of Fender Japan’s coveted Factory Special Run series, it delivers authentic 1960s-inspired aesthetics and playability with the renowned build quality that makes MIJ instruments so highly sought after. The all-black finish with matching headstock gives it a menacing, custom-shop look that stands out on any stage or in the studio.

Condition: Excellent player-grade condition. It shows some honest light use with a few small dings, scuffs, dents, and light surface scratches — all consistent with a well-loved instrument. Overall, it remains in very nice shape with no major issues, no cracks, and everything functioning perfectly. The gloss still pops, and the black finish hides wear while keeping that killer stealth aesthetic.

Playability & Setup: Professionally set up and dialed in for optimal tone and effortless playability. Smooth low action, accurate intonation, balanced neck feel — it’s ready to go straight out of the case and inspire your best grooves.

Tone & Features:

•  Classic dual vintage-style single-coil Jazz Bass pickups deliver that signature punchy, articulate J-Bass tone: tight lows, singing mids, and sparkling highs with excellent clarity and dynamics.

•  Basswood body for lightweight comfort and great resonance.

•  Maple neck with comfortable slim profile.

•  Rosewood fingerboard for smooth feel and warm response.

•  Vintage-style hardware, including the 4-saddle bridge and tuners.

•  34” scale length — the perfect Jazz Bass recipe.

Whether you’re laying down funky slap lines, smooth fingerstyle grooves, or thumping rock foundations, this bass responds with authority and musicality. The all-black look with matching headstock makes it a true standout — modern ninja meets vintage soul.

Limited-run Japanese Fender basses like this don’t stick around long. This one is a proven player that looks sharp, feels fantastic, and sounds massive.

DM for videos, detailed photos, or to set up a play test. Shipping available worldwide with full protection.

Lock in this blacked-out beauty before it’s gone — your new favorite Jazz Bass awaits! 🎸⚡​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​



🔥 This guitar (or bass) has been professionally set up and dialed in for optimal tone and playability. Unless otherwise noted in the listing, It features low action with no buzzing or dead spots, perfect intonation, a brand-new set of American-made Ernie Ball strings, and a straight neck with a fully functional truss rod. Wr make sure all frets are leveled, dressed, crowned, and polished to a mirror shine. The fingerboard has been thoroughly cleaned (unfinished rosewood and ebony boards are treated with Fret Doctor, a premium all-natural oil). All electronics function flawlessly. The guitar has been deep-cleaned and detailed and arrives stage- or studio-ready. 🔥


About The Guitar Dude 

Three-time NAMM Top 100 Dealer worldwide. Specializing in premium Gibson, classic Fender guitars from all eras and the best Japanese made treasures. Known for the highest-quality consignment sales and custom layaway plans (available on select guitars and extendable beyond 45 days to fit your budget—contact us for details).  

Often copied, never duplicated. Follow us on Facebook & Instagram for beautiful guitar content. 


Consignment Services

Like what you see? Let us go to work for you. We offer the best and most fair priced consignment service on the planet! Look for me online. @TheGuitarDude


Our Guarantee  

We stand behind every guitar we sell. “Good enough” is never good enough. Every instrument is inspected, set up, and tested by multiple people immediately before shipping. We deliver the highest standard of quality and have built a reputation as a three-time NAMM Top 100 Dealer since 2009. The Dude Abides.  


Neck & Setup - (unless otherwise noted)

- Neck is perfectly straight with no truss-rod issues. 

- Intonation is spot-on.  

- Professionally set up with low action and new American-made strings.  

- All frets are dressed, leveled, crowned (if needed), and all frets on all guitars are polished to shine like new with no divots.  


Return Policy, Restocking Fees & No Tire-Kicking Policy 

We follow Reverb’s 7-day return policy. However:  

- You must notify us in writing within 3 days of delivery (per tracking) of your intent to return.  

- Original shipping and return shipping costs are not refunded unless the guitar is damaged in transit or is significantly not as described.  

- A 15% restocking fee applies to all returns for any reason other than damage in transit or significantly not as described.  


We do our best to honestly describe and photograph every guitar and most of the noticeable imperfections. That said, we are human, if something very small can be overseen, if tiny marks, dings or super fine scratches (normal wear) bother you, please don't buy.


We record demo videos of every guitar before shipping to document exact condition and performance. Additional photos, measurements, or in-hand descriptions are available upon request prior to purchase.  


Minor adjustments and tweaks to a set up (for example to correct a slight buzz or truss-rod tweak) are normal after shipping due to carrier mishandling the package, climate & atmospheric changes, especially when moving from South Florida to colder or less humid environments. These slight issues do not constitute “significantly not as described.” Guitars must be returned in the exact same condition as received/advertised or additional repair/restocking fees will apply.  


We are a small family owned and run business, not a big-chain retailer. We invest significant time, money and effort into every guitar. This is a NO TIRE-KICKING shop. There is no post purchase haggling, returns without restocking fees or partial refunds. If minor cosmetic marks, tiny imperfections, or the possibility of a post-shipping setup tweak makes you uncomfortable, please do not buy. Plenty of large retailers offer free trials and can absorb shipping costs—we do not.  


Payment, Shipping & International Duties  

- All items can be shipped internationally. Buyer is fully responsible for all import duties, taxes, and customs fees.  

- We accept PayPal, PayPal Credit, Affirm, and other major payment methods.  

- Most U.S. shipments are sent via UPS or FedEx with full insurance, tracking, and signature confirmation. All packages are professionally packed for maximum protection.  


International Shipping Note 

International shipping prices shown are for most countries. Certain countries have higher costs. We try and avoid USPS and mostly ship UPS, but USPS is the only available or reasonable carrier in certain situations. Express services (UPS, DHL, FedEx) are always available. We can’t under value merchandise as it can not be properly insured. If you would like to discuss different avenues, contact us by phone for a personalized quote.  


Thank you for considering The Guitar Dude. We look forward to earning your business and delivering a guitar that exceeds your expectations. Contact us anytime for questions, consignment inquiries, layaway details, or a personalized shipping quote.
